description: TAM anchor_step sweep: anchor_step=3 (PGD on 3 opt_step unroll). All else fixed: pgd_delta=1.5, mining_opt_steps=3, gc_loss. Compare to q220 (anchor_step=2). If anchor_step too large, trajectory drifts far from x_pos; expects smaller neg_dist. SUCCESS: val_mse < 0.00975 and anchor_dist in (0.2, 5.0).
notes: TAM anchor_step=3 variant. Anchor PGD on 3 opt_step trajectory point instead of 2. If anchor too far from x_pos, expects smaller neg_dist (closer to x_pos). Key diagnostic: anchor_dist should be in (0.2, 5.0). If successful, compare mse vs q220.
